name: Alice Stewart
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

This election is
going to come down to three key issues - jobs, freedom, and
security. If we want to boost opportunity, protect our
constitutional liberties, and keep our children safe, we need to
elect a leader who we know will serve the people with integrity
and courage.

And when it comes to
jobs, Ted's first priority -- as he said on the trail yesterday,
-- "will be bringing back jobs to America, raising wages,
bringing back the economic growth that has made America the
powerhouse of the world."

Ted Cruz will
reignite job growth by abolishing the IRS, replacing the
convoluted tax system with a Simple Flat Tax, and repealing
Obamacare, and rolling back the massive regulatory state. He will
reverse policies that put American manufacturers at a
disadvantage and allow more jobs to be created for working men
and women.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

Friend -- Check out this email from Senator Claire McCaskill about why Democrats need Katie in the Senate. 2016 is our big opportunity to elect Pennsylvania's first woman senator and take the Senate back from do-nothing Republicans like Pat Toomey.

Senator McCaskill knows a thing or two about winning tough races, and about being a pathbreaking woman senator. **Please read her email below,[and then donate to help Katie hit her 1,200 new donors goal before Thursday's critical end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5323856076448202752/9152463432467873792?refcode=e20160329&refcode2=e20160329nd&amount=25)**

_\--- Original Message ---
From: Claire McCaskill
Subject: Hurry -- help make history_

Friend,

We can't afford another two years with a Republican Senate -- Mitch McConnell made that crystal clear when he declared the Senate wouldn't do its job to vote on Supreme Court nominees.

So with the future of the Supreme Court held hostage by Senate Republicans, I need you to do one thing now: **Support my friend Katie McGinty for Senate in Pennsylvania to help take back our Democratic majority.**

Katie's primary is in a dead heat, and with six out of every 10 Democratic Pennsylvania voters undecided, Katie needs our support to win. **[Will you donate $5 or more now to help Katie win in Pennsylvania and turn our Senate blue?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5323856076448202752/9152463432467873792?refcode=e20160329&refcode2=e20160329nd&amount=25)**

So much is at stake here: Electing Katie means we can secure a Democratic Senate that won't put the American people on the back burner while it plays partisan games.

It means we can confirm Supreme Court justices who will defend women's rights, uphold the Affordable Care Act and finally overturn _Citizens United_.

Plus, electing Katie means making history: She would be Pennsylvania's first woman senator -- and that's progress I know we can all get behind.

So now, more than ever, I'm hoping you'll join me: **Will you donate $5 to elect Katie McGinty in Pennsylvania and take back our Democratic Senate?**

**[Click here to donate $5 or more before midnight to help Katie McGinty win in Pennsylvania and turn the Senate blue!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5323856076448202752/9152463432467873792?refcode=e20160329&refcode2=e20160329nd&amount=25)**

Thanks,

Claire

body:
Friend, I need you to commit in the next few hours. Ted emailed you yesterday about our campaign's FEC fundraising deadline -- it's now two days away -- and he told me this morning that he still hasn't heard back from you. |
Friend,

I need you to commit in the next few hours.

Ted emailed you yesterday about our campaign's FEC fundraising deadline -- it's now two days away -- and he told me this morning that he still hasn't heard back from you.

So, if you missed the message or were waiting to commit -- [**now's the time (click here).**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r)

Or...if you replied and your email didn't reach Ted before he emailed me -- I'm sorry to have caused alarm.

It boils down to this, Ted and I need your help now -- before the FEC deadline (more on that in Ted's original email below).

Our campaign is still $280k short of our deadline fundraising goal.

Ted told you this goal is make-or-break, and I'm afraid he's 100% correct.

We're fighting on three fronts -- against the Washington Cartel, against Donald Trump's faux conservatism, and against Hillary Clinton. That fight is not cheap, and to stay in this race, we MUST beat our goal while there's still time.

Friend, that's where you come in...[**will you stop now and make a special FEC DEADLINE DONATION of $3 now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r)

Ted and I thank you for your support -- and in advance for your generous donation!

Thank you,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager, Cruz President

\--Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Ted Cruz
To: [jeff.r@tedcruz.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r)
---|---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r)
---
Jeff -- **[tomorrow](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r) is too late. **

I emailed you two days ago...but now the situation is serious.

As of right now, I am still well short of my FEC mandated End-of-Quarter deadline by more than four-hundred thousand dollars.

Yes. That much.

Our campaign -- Heidi and I -- need you to keep us in this race.

_In just a few short days, we have to come up with the difference or risk missing our EOQ deadline goal and letting you and the rest of our dedicated volunteers and campaign staff down._

I've faced a lot of tough decisions in this campaign, and now, I need you to make a tough decision with me -- [**will you decide to contribute $35 or $50 towards my EMERGENCY EOQ fund?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r)

The next few hours will be make-or-break for my run for the presidency.

So, I need to ask for your immediate financial support.

This election has taken its toll, and we've come a long way -- but my biggest deadline is approaching, and I need your help BEFORE I come up short.

After [March 31st,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r) our campaign must file financial reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) detailing contributions and expenditures.

Once my report is made public, the liberal media will begin scouring every line looking for weakness.

Please don't let that happen. [**Make a contribution of $35 or $50 towards my EMERGENCY EOQ fund before it's too late.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34470923:sb24zMCNx:m:1:1104269936:A827E53FAE23E9DCED47017751856D41:r)

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Tommy Thompson, Former Governor of Wisconsin
subject: Vote for Cruz/Trump = Hillary Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
A vote for Ted Cruz or Donald Trump is a vote for Hillary.

Peter, a vote for Ted Cruz or
Donald Trump is a vote for Hillary.

Let me say that again...

A vote for Ted Cruz or Donald
Trump is a vote for Hillary.

It's pretty simple math. If
either of them becomes our nominee, Hillary will be in the White
House.

Need proof? Six national polls
released in just the last week all say the same thing: Gov. John
Kasich is the ONLY Republican who can defeat Hillary Clinton this
fall.

We're just one week away from
Wisconsin's Primary and if we want to win the presidency and also
ensure that we keep the majorities in the Senate/House, it's
critical that we support John Kasich RIGHT NOW.

READ MORE: Bloomberg View: Cruz,
Not Kasich, Is the Trump Enabler

A Quinnipiac Poll released last
week shows Hillary Clinton would beat Trump 46-40 and Cruz 45-42
in November. Gov. Kasich, on the other hand, polls ahead of
Clinton at 47-39 in a head-to-head matchup.

To put a conservative back in the
White House, Gov. John Kasich is our only hope. I urge my fellow
Republicans to support his campaign right now with your vote or a
generous contribution.

Sincerely,

Tommy Thompson
Former Governor of Wisconsin
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America

subject: My mother’s advice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
My French professor really said this! | Friend --

When I started my freshman year at Wellesley, I didn’t hit my stride right away. I thought I might study to be a doctor or scientist -- until I enrolled in some math and geology courses! I tried my hand at foreign languages, and my French professor said, “Mademoiselle, your talents lie elsewhere.” So I called my parents for advice -- my mother told me she didn’t want me to be a quitter, that I had to keep working and find my place. As usual, she was right.

I’ve learned over and over in my life that hard work can lead to big changes, and this team has proved that in spades this year. We fought tooth and nail for our win in Iowa, and since then, we’ve shown that we are a force to be reckoned with -- we’ve got more delegates, more votes, and we’ve even reached one million donors!

**But Senator Sanders’s team is still outraising ours by millions of dollars -- then turning around and outspending us. It’s a large gap to close, but if 17 people in your area chip in today, we’ll get there in no time. Hillary

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Defense Secretary: Veterans Wanted
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719b9b/3476a20e/c7b2a1c/2745ed3d/3821198681/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Former Secretary of Defense Chuck Hagel: "When you look at the presidential candidates today, not one is a veteran. Our current president and vice president are not veterans. The entire senior White House security staff, none are veterans...**we 're losing that perspective, and it's not good for our country. It's not good for our policy making. _We need the input of our veterans_."** How many Democrats voted for Iraq; how few experienced the military; how fewer saw war; and how rare for one to speak up with a knowledge that can properly shape our foreign policy - not even the top two Democratic Senate leaders (nor Republican). | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719b9b/3476a20e/c7b2a1c/2745ed3c/3821198681/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0329FBb1")
---
From ISIS, China, sub-Saharan Africa, homeland defense, what's wanted is experience for not just what to do, but _what not to do_ to avoid another Iraq - and with the cred to be listened to.
31 years rising to Vice Admiral; war command aircraft carrier battle group; Director, Navy's anti-terrorism unit; President Clinton's Director for Defense Policy at the National Security Council; traveled over 80 countries across continents.
No one wants a stronger defense of America than I do...but the lack of credible voices against war in Iraq harmed our overall security. Our "common defense" must serve the "general welfare" of our nation - which is why restraint is the characteristic most admired in man.
I ask your support to send a Senator to Washington who knows the lesson of unneeded wars, but has the wisdom of necessary defense. [Please contribute $6, $16, $66, or $106 and help me make it so.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719b9b/3476a20e/c7b2a1c/2745ed3b/3821198681/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0329FBp1")

Joe

name: Rand Paul
subject: 4-4 Tie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for U
body:
Dear Patriot:

Earlier today, the U.S. Supreme Court issued
a "decision" on one of the most important issues it was set to
take on during all of 2016 . . .

Hundreds of millions of dollars government
union officials routinely seize from workers were at stake.

Before Justice Scalia's passing in February,
many believed the Court was set to issue a big win for liberty.
They thought the Court may very well outlaw forced union dues for
government sector workers nationwide.

Instead, their 4-4 decision today did little
but kick the can down the road.

Patriot, I know I've stated so many times now
just how important 2016 is to our country. But when you think
about what we have to lose with this fight alone, it boggles your
mind.

That's why I must ask for your most generous
contribution of $50, $25, $10 -- or even more if you can -- in
support of my campaign's critical End of Quarter Money Bomb.

>> DEADLINE IS MARCH
31ST >>

You see, for decades -- with the federal
government's blessing -- union bosses have been able to force
workers to pay union dues as a condition of employment.

So under the threat of being fired, American
workers are forced to cough up billions in forced dues dollars --
billions that are used, in many cases, to bankroll the campaigns

subject: Did you know Patrick's birthday is tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae231b/738133e4/3414cb2a/7f820d7e/11017696/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160329?refcode=pme160329_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Friends,

I heard Patrick's birthday is coming up.

I also heard that his team is working hard to raise $10,000 by his birthday to help him win his competitive Senate race.

Well, I support birthdays. I support goals. **And I support Patrick winning back Florida 's U.S. Senate seat for Democrats.** So I thought I'd lend a hand.

I can tell you from experience that when it's your birthday, and it's an election year, seeing your grassroots network step up is a fantastic gift. The best, really. [_**Team Murphy is just $5,271 away from reaching the $10,000 birthday goal. Can you chip in $5?**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae231b/738133e4/3414cb2a/7f820d7e/11017696/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160329?refcode=pme160329_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

You know what I'd love to see Patrick doing for his birthday next year? **Representing Florida in the U.S. Senate.**

Patrick is dedicated to the ongoing fight to get special interest money out of politics. He's worked for years to protect the Everglades and combat climate change.

Long story short: **Patrick will be a U.S. Senator that Florida families can count on.**

Florida is a swing state. Dark money groups, special interests, and Super PACs will practically move there this year, and they'll have their huge bank accounts with them.

So here's what we do. We work together. We get Patrick's back. **And we reach this $10,000 goal before his birthday is over so that he has the resources he needs to win.**

[_**Click here and make a contribution.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae231b/738133e4/3414cb2a/7f820d7e/11017696/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160329?refcode=pme160329_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks.

Al

P.S.: I'd like to introduce you to my patented [_**extra ask in the P.S.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae231b/738133e4/3414cb2a/7f820d7e/11017696/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160329?refcode=pme160329_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00") I've been doing it forever and yes, it works. Just watch: _Patrick 's birthday is TOMORROW_. **Don 't miss your chance to give $5 or more and help Team Murphy reach the $10,000 birthday goal.** [_**Give now.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae231b/738133e4/3414cb2a/7f820d7e/11017696/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160329?refcode=pme160329_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

subject: Your contribution can change the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
One of the great accomplishments of this campaign is proving to candidates everywhere that **you don 't have to beg millionaires and billionaires for money to run a successful campaign.**
And that is important because you cannot start to change a rigged economy, combat climate change, or take on people who profit from high drug prices by relying on their money.
**So I want you to imagine what that will mean when we win** and politicians decide they don't need to take money from the financial elite who are buying our candidates and elections. It will mean we can start to create an economy that works for everyone and not just wealthy campaign contributors, that we can stop fracking and leave fossil fuels in the ground, that we can provide health care as a right for every man, woman and child in this country.
**That is how your contribution can change the world.** And it's why we have to ask:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign before Thursday 's critical FEC fundraising deadline and we will win Wisconsin, the Democratic primary, and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-can-change-the-world?refcode=em160329s1-v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-can-change-the-world?refcode=em160329s1-v1-full")
When we talk about a political revolution in this country, we are not talking about tinkering around the edges or incremental change. Our political system is corrupt and big money controls much of what happens in Washington, D.C. This moment in our history requires transformational change.
And if we continue to stand together, that is what we are going to accomplish through this campaign. Wisconsin is next, and Bernie needs you.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Let that sink in. _Donald Trump_ choosing the person who will affect our nation for decades. Senator Ron Johnson is among the loudest voices in opposing President Obama's Supreme Court nominee. Why? He's trying to hold a seat on the bench for Donald Trump's pick. Now, we know that the path to a Trump victory is anything but certain, and you'd better believe that we'll fight tooth and nail to prevent that from becoming a reality. But here's one thing we _can_ control, right here in Wisconsin: **We can elect a senator who will do their job.** But we need your help to make sure we reach our goal of $100,000 before our March 31 deadline. clean_body: Donald Trump might pick our next Supreme Court nominee... | "" Friend -- Imagine this: Donald Trump picking our next Supreme Court nominee. Let that sink in. Donald Trump choosing the person who will affect our nation for decades. Senator Ron Johnson is among the loudest voices in opposing President Obama's Supreme Court nominee. Why? He's trying to hold a seat on the bench for Donald Trump's pick. Now, we know that the path to a Trump victory is anything but certain, and you'd better believe that we'll fight tooth and nail to prevent that from becoming a reality. But here's one thing we can control, right here in Wisconsin: We can elect a senator who will do their job. But we need your help to make sure we reach our goal of $100,000 before our March 31 deadline. Senator Johnson and his three (yes, three!) super PACs are preparing to attack Russ at every opportunity. "" "" "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" The time to stand up is now. Just last week, Senator Johnson said that he'd be excited to "stump with Trump" on the campaign trail, and bragged that "it'd be the Ronald [and] the Donald." Sounds like a bad buddy comedy movie to me, but clearly, Senator Johnson is looking forward to it. Senator Johnson is cozying up to politicians who spew vile, hate-filled rhetoric, all while preparing to spend millions attacking us with that same ferocity. We have to make sure that we reach our FEC filing goal before it's too late. "" Thank you for taking a stand against Trump and Johnson. Tom Russell Campaign Manager ""

name: John Weaver
subject: We're under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America
body:
The Cruz team must be REALLY scared of Gov. John Kasich because
they just launched a half a million dollar TV ad buy attacking us
in Wisconsin.
We're guessing it has something
to do with the six polls in a week that show how badly Hillary
would crush Cruz/Trump if either of them becomes the nominee.
Peter, I'm very proud of the
positive campaign Gov. Kasich has run and we'll continue to offer
Americans a positive vision for the future of our country, but we
have to defend ourselves too. Please consider chipping in $25,
$50 or more right now to help us get our message out.
Not only is John Kasich the ONLY
Republican who can defeat Hillary Clinton, but he also has a
proven conservative record cutting taxes, creating jobs,
balancing budgets and his eighteen years on the House Armed
Services Committee has prepared him to be Commander-In-Chief on
Day One.
Thank you for all that you're
doing.

John Weaver
Chief Strategist

JohnKasich.com

--
From: Beth Hansen
To: John Weaver
Subject: Three quick updates

John,
1. Gov. John Kasich will be
participating in a live CNN Town Hall this evening and a MSNBC
Town Hall tomorrow evening.

In an election cycle that seems
to be so focused on the Trump/Cruz personal attacks, please
consider watching to see for yourself why John Kasich is the only
Republican polls show will defeat Hillary this fall.
CNN Town Hall w/ Gov. John Kasich
Date: Tuesday, March 29th
Time: 10:00PM EST
Where to watch: CNN
MSNBC Town Hall w/ Gov. John
Kasich
Date: Wednesday, March 30th
Time: 7:00PM EST
Where to watch: MSNBC

2. I know the fundraising emails
get annoying but the funds we raise are a critical to supporting
our grassroots programs. The Wisconsin Primary is just one week
away and this will be a great opportunity for us to grab some
more delegates.
Please consider chipping in $25
or more right now before our midnight Thursday March fundraising
deadline: JohnKasich.com/Deadline

3. Six national polls in the last
week have all shown that Gov. John Kasich is the ONLY Republican
candidate who can defeat Hillary. If we want to win the White
House and maintain our majorities in the Senate/House, it's
critical that our party unify behind John Kasich at the
convention.

READ: Bloomberg View: Cruz, Not
Kasich, Is the Trump Enabler

READ: Gov. Tommy Thompson: A vote
for Ted Cruz is a vote for Hillary Clinton

READ: John Kasich Best Prepared
to Lead on National Security

Gov. John Kasich's has a positive
message for America's future, a conservative record of
accomplishment and the national security experience to keep us
safe.

Thank you for your support!

-Beth

Beth Hansen
Campaign Manager

JohnKasich.com

subject: Can you sign our letter to the Clinton campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
We sent a letter to Hillary Clinton's campaign over the weekend asking for a debate in New York before its battleground primary on April 19.
[**Add your name to our letter to say you want to see Hillary Clinton and Bernie Sanders debate in New York.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/new-york-debate?source=em160329v1-a "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/new-york-debate?source=em160329v1-a")
**[Add your name»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/new-york-debate?source=em160329v1-a "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/new-york-debate?source=em160329v1-a")**
You can read the full letter to Clinton Campaign Manager Robby Mook here:
_Dear Robby,_
_I am writing to you about the remaining, agreed-upon Democratic primary season debates inApril and May of this year. As you know, Secretary Clinton agreed to three additional debates - one in March, one in April, one in May - in return for our campaign agreeing to the late-scheduled debate in New Hampshire prior to that state's primary._
_At Senator Sanders ' request, the March debate was held in Michigan. As I understand it, there was previously agreement reached by our representatives for the May debate to be held in California. I trust that commitment remains on your part._
_However, there has not been agreement on the April debate in terms of date or location. Our campaign continues to believe that the people of New York deserve to have the debate held in their state, and that it should be held prior to the New York primary._
_Given the outcome of electoral contests sinceMarch 15th it is clearer than ever that New York will play a critical role in determining the Democratic nominee. However, your campaign has consistently chosen to deny the people of New York the opportunity to see Senator Sanders and Secretary Clinton debate in the Empire State._
_It is difficult to understand your motivation. I have received calls from numerous news companies seeking to sponsor a New York debate so I know the media interest would be high. Can you please explain why New York should not host the April debate? Is the Secretary concerned about debating before the people who twice elected her to the U.S. Senate?_
_Perhaps there is some tactical advantage you are seeking by avoiding a debate in New York but I would remind you that Senator Sanders agreed to debate the Secretary in New Hampshire when he was well ahead in the polls._
_I look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience so we can schedule the New York debatein April._
_Regards,_
_Jeff Weaver_
